content:
# Gdoll story 1

```Before all the truths came to light, no one suspected that Doll would be the true culprit behind that series of sensational events. After all, her presence in Mythag and the Dissolution Front had always been like a pillar and a lighthouse, an unwavering reliance for everyone. When countless stars in the human night sky were dissolved and dissipated this unshakeable human beacon finally extinguished cruelly, turning into a force in the shadows allied with darkness. T`ornadoes, floods, earthquakes... The inefficient killings clearly did not fit a genius's plan; she used her undiminished wisdom to transform the Silver chip technology she once prided herself on into a deadly weapon to "push the world," sending piece after piece of destruction into the unseen corners of Mythag. When she was finally captured, the doll's body could no longer be precisely controlled by the corroded brain, her once calm face filled with a twisted and eerie expression, as if meeting her gaze would plunge you into the abyss of madness. Everyone unanimously chose to ignore her sometimes vague whispers. even if they might really reveal the truth of the world. Because her story had once again proven that humans ultimately need meaning to survive.```

# Gdoll Story 2

```Due to the fact that the Genesis A waker, formerly known as the "Brain in a jar,'" has a history of breaking free from the S355 restrainer, it has been relocated by Dean Czort and placed in a new special dissolution restrainer. This restrainer is located deep within the Black Pool. To ensure that there are no other instruments or items within a 30-meter radius of the restrainer, the Black Pool monitoring team has arranged for at least one patrol every 60 minutes. During monitoring, it has been noted that this A waker remains conscious and almost never engages in sleep activities. The A waker once attempted to narrate to the patrol members about its previous illegal Silver chip modification experiments. and a team member fell into madness after brief communication. Currently, all patrol teams consist of three members. who are strictly prohibited from making contact or conversing with the Awaker and must wear soundproof earmuffs throughout the patrol. 
------
The confidentiality restriction level of this A waker has reached the highest level of A waker management. No one informed of the details is allowed to disclose information about this A waker inside or outside of Mythag. and without the dean's approval and personal escort, visits are prohibited. - Excerpted firom "Mythag Black Pool Monitoring Team Report Records"```

this is just the first idea that comes to my mind, but it might be relevant to it:
the talmud says that the original torah yhwh gave to moses was written "in black fire upon white fire"
the white fire in this case is usually interpreted to symbolize the teachings and knowledge of yhwh bestowed upon humanity that is ambiguous - going beyond the actual text and words they have spoken to beings, but that which is necessary for humans to learn from for their future

though honestly a pale or white flame is a symbol in quite a few religions as well
